---
title: "Teaching — Germán A. Tessmer"
description: "Teaching experience in Econometrics, Microeconomics, and Social Sciences at Universidad Nacional de Rosario, Universidad Austral, and Universidad de San Andrés."
---

## Universidad Nacional de Rosario (UNR)

**Undergraduate**

- Econometrics II *(Lecturer, 2024–present)*
- Sociology *(Teaching Assistant, 2021–present)*
- Introduction to Social Sciences *(Teaching Assistant, 2014–2020)*
- Microeconomics II *(Teaching Assistant, 2010–2020)*

---

## Universidad Austral (Rosario)

**Graduate**

- Industrial Organization *(Guest Lecturer, 2021)*
- Mathematics, Statistics & Microeconomics Bootcamp *(Guest Lecturer, 2021)*


**Undergraduate**

- Topics in Macroeconomics *(Guest Lecturer, 2020)*
- History of Economic Thought *(Guest Lecturer, 2019)*


---

## Universidad de San Andrés

**Undergraduate**

- Economics I *(Teaching Assistant, 2013)*
